text: I stand here in the midst of glass-walled conference rooms and bold declarations of research and development. The sterile meeting space behind glass makes me feel distant, almost as if the world outside is meant only for observation—not participation. Turning towards the R+D wall, the bright lights and ambitious language evoke a sense of hope and progress, but also a questioning: does innovation truly connect us, or merely offer the illusion of connection? I feel both inspired by the promise of human ingenuity and skeptical about the genuine value it brings to our lives.
